message: 30 mins into this promotional campaign and its already proving to be a great success
I'm seeing a lot of sales coming in
It was definitely a great idea offering a free tote for every $50 spent
People love free stuff
Sales are definitely looking good team. If we keep this up Ill treat the whole team to dinner next friday
In that case Im going to have my eyes glued to the monitoring services to make sure there are no hiccups
Yeah guys. Just be vigilant. Because theres such a high volume of sales something could easily go wrong
Remember everyone if theres anything unusual raise the flag immediately. Heres to a hitch-free sale!
Clicked Start button
This is strange
We're getting a few reports now regarding not receiving order confirmation emails
Hmm? that sounds strange. @player2 can you take point and start sizing this up?
Hello
How many reports are we receiving?
I will gather reports
I can see that purchases are available am i correct that only confirmation emails are not coming in?
Customers report not receiving email confirmation leading to confusion about whether the order has been placed and or if something went wrong
Some customers complain that they have placed several orders by mistake due to not receiving a confirmation email
I tried to place an order but it failed
I ll create an incident with SEV-3 impact due to purchases are coming through
Are we using any third party to get confirmation emails?
Order is going through but not the confirmation email
create P3 Users are not receiving confirmation emails
*Incident Number INC100069:* create P3 Users are not receiving confirmation emails
Saw the ticket pop up! Can you give me full business impact on this!?

deployments

The logs show that the emails failed to send. Perhaps it's in a stuck process
We could try a simple restart it might work
We can see that Amazon might be the cause shall we contact them?
This doesnt  look like a code issue. More of a infra related issue

quick summary:
*Incident summary:* Customers were not receiving order confirmation emails during an ongoing promotional campaign. Orders were being successfully processed but email notifications were failing leading to customer confusion and some placing multiple orders by mistake.
*Impact:* Affected customers did not receive confirmation emails causing uncertainty about order success and leading to duplicate order submissions. Sales were still processing so the impact was moderate (SEV-3).
*Start date/time:* 19/11/2025 12:06 UTC
*End date/time:* Not specified
*Next steps:*
• Confirm which service or third-party provider handles confirmation email delivery
• Investigate whether recent platform changes affected the email sending process
• Validate system logs to confirm that order placement events are triggering email notifications correctly
• Implement monitoring or alerting for failed email sends to prevent recurrence

Proficient Cloud Services is our Managed Service Provider (MSP) for AWS. Whenever we've faced issues or needed service changes with AWS in the past we've routed our communications through them
@player2 In order to reach out to the PCS we have support channel can you raise the ticket with them meanwhile i will continue monitoring our systems
This looks like a email quota exhaustion
We have contacted Amazon investigation ongoing
You're right Daniel. @player2 we need to get it raised. Provide the details in support chat to 3rd party
sure already done and information provided to Amazon
Thanks for clarifying. We'll escalate this to AWS on your behalf and request a temporary quota increase
